lint.details: ESLint not configured yet. Treated as pass per services.yaml fallback.

build.details: tsc and vite build succeeded. 135 modules, built in 45.19s.

nonBlockingIssues.highlights: Mixed type hint styles, BrandConfig String(7) limits, global mutable state in database.py, missing cascade delete test
Redundant uuid imports, weak default secret_key, untyped dict response, timezone handling, logout without JWT validation
Dead _validate_email_format function, redundant dual uuid import, race condition on duplicate email, missing full_name validation on update
Duplicated TOKEN_KEY constant, no proactive JWT expiry check, localStorage role tampering (UI-only), odd password placeholder, modal state not reset

appliedUpdates.description: Added OneDrive path workaround, PowerShell template literal escaping, UTF-8 without BOM convention
Added SQLite JSONB test pattern, auth middleware placement docs, known technical debt

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Python type hint convention: Use Optional[str] consistently (not str | None PEP 604 syntax)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backend/app/config.py mixes both styles across features

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify auth dependencies live in backend/app/services/auth_middleware.py, not backend/app/middleware/
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two reviewers flagged this convention gap. Workers correctly used services/ not middleware/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify frontend placement: pages/ for page-level, components/{Feature}/ for reusable, components/Auth/ for auth
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m1-auth-frontend mixed AdminPanel in pages/ but LoginPage in components/Auth/

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: shared frontend constants in a single module, not duplicated across files
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: TOKEN_KEY duplicated in client.ts and AuthContext.tsx

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add TDD exception for infrastructure and enhancement features where strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR is impractical
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 backend workers deviated from TDD procedure for valid reasons

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note vitest may not be configured. Accept tsc --noEmit + npm run build as alternatives
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: services.yaml test_frontend echoes No tests configured yet

rejectedObservations.observation: Dual uuid import pattern in admin.py
rejectedObservations.reason: Code quality issue, not a convention gap. Normal cleanup.

rejectedObservations.observation: Admin CRUD split across two features
rejectedObservations.reason: Normal incremental development. Ownership clear from features.json.
